phrases.en: Kate sits down in front of the mirror.
She smooths a thin layer of moisturizer over her face.
phrases.zh: 她在脸上薄薄地涂一层保湿霜。

phrases.en: Then she dabs some foundation onto her cheeks.
phrases.zh: 然后她在脸颊上轻拍一些粉底。

phrases.en: She blends it in gently with a soft sponge.
phrases.zh: 她用一块柔软的海绵把它轻轻涂匀。

phrases.en: Next, she brushes a little blush onto her cheekbones.
phrases.zh: 接着，她在颧骨上刷一点腮红。

phrases.en: She closes one eye and draws a neat line along the lash with eyeliner.
phrases.zh: 她闭上一只眼睛，用眼线笔沿着睫毛画一条整齐的线。

phrases.en: Carefully, she sweeps mascara over her upper lashes.
phrases.zh: 她小心地把睫毛膏刷在上睫毛上。

phrases.en: She blinks slowly so the mascara dries.
phrases.zh: 她慢慢眨眼，让睫毛膏变干。

phrases.en: Now she uncaps a tube of lipstick.
phrases.zh: 现在她打开一支口红的盖子。

phrases.en: She colors her lips with a soft pink shade.
phrases.zh: 她用一种柔和的粉色涂抹嘴唇。

phrases.en: Then she presses her lips together on a tissue.
phrases.zh: 然后她把嘴唇合在一张纸巾上抿一下。

phrases.en: Finally, she checks her face in the mirror and smiles.
phrases.zh: 最后，她在镜子里检查自己的脸，露出微笑。
